indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space provides ample room for movement and comfort.

indicators.name: Minimalist furniture
indicators.rationale: The minimalist furniture reduces distractions and allows for a clear view of the workspace.

indicators.name: Bright natural light
indicators.rationale: The bright natural light can reduce eye strain and improve mood.

indicators.name: Hard floor
indicators.rationale: A hard floor might be uncomfortable to sit on for extended periods.

reasoning_summary: The space is well-suited for computer work due to its open layout, minimalistic furniture, and bright lighting, but the hard floor could be less comfortable for extended use.
